pr.title: Implement symbol replace tools and pull symbols from #766
pr.author: ribbanya

summary: Added Rust/Cargo tooling for synchronizing symbol names between linker maps and used it to import a large batch of symbol renames from PR #766. The PR body documents `melee-diff-symbols`, which compares two `GALE01.map` files and emits `FIND:REPLACE` pairs, and `melee-replace-symbols`, which applies those pairs across the working directory, including stdin piping with `-`. It also introduced/aided large-scale address-stable renames such as `func_8000AEC8` to `lbTime_8000AEC8`, many `func_`/`lbl_` symbols to `lb_8000....`, and casing cleanup like `lbvector_Normalize` to `lbVector_Normalize`. The exact diff and changed-file list are unavailable in the slice because GitHub rejected the oversized diff.
key_files: tools/diff-symbols or equivalent package path for `melee-diff-symbols` (path inferred from Cargo package name; diff unavailable)
tools/replace-symbols or equivalent package path for `melee-replace-symbols` (path inferred from Cargo package name; diff unavailable)
what_changed: Implemented `melee-diff-symbols`, a tool described as diffing two linker maps and outputting `FIND:REPLACE` pairs representing symbol-name differences.
Implemented `melee-replace-symbols`, a tool described as replacing all listed symbols in the working directory from a replacements file or from stdin.
Supported a piped workflow: `melee-diff-symbols ... | melee-replace-symbols -- -`, where `-` means stdin and can also be empty.
Added a `--table` / `-t` option to `melee-diff-symbols` for generating an HTML-style table of address/from/to rename rows.
Applied a large imported rename set from PR #766; the PR notes the full rename list was too long for GitHub and links an external HTML table.

Renamed examples include `func_8000AEC8` through `func_8000B028` to `lbTime_8000AEC8` through `lbTime_8000B028`, many `func_8000....` and `lbl_8000....` symbols to `lb_8000....`, and `lbvector_*` to `lbVector_*`.
smart_moves: Used linker maps as the source of truth for bulk renames, preserving address correspondence while changing names.
Separated discovery from application: one command generates editable `FIND:REPLACE` pairs, another applies them repository-wide.
Made the workflow composable with stdin piping, allowing generated rename lists to be reviewed, edited, saved, or applied directly.
Added tabular output for auditability of large rename batches, including address/from/to columns.
Documented command examples directly in the PR body, making the tooling immediately reusable by later rename PRs.
Made both diff and replace heavily multithreaded, which matters for repository-wide symbol rewrites.
decomp_lessons: For large symbol-renaming work, compare linker maps and derive address-keyed rename pairs instead of manually editing individual references.
Keep bulk rename lists in a simple `from:to` format so they can be reviewed, edited, generated by scripts, or piped between tools.
When a rename set is too large for GitHub review, provide summarized examples plus a separate full table or artifact for local inspection.
A repository-wide symbol replacement tool reduces the risk of missing references in source, headers, assembly labels, maps, and symbol metadata.
Prefer module- or subsystem-prefixed placeholders such as `lb_8000....` over generic `func_`/`lbl_` names when the module is known but the function purpose is not yet known.
Casing consistency matters for decomp symbol hygiene; this PR shows `lbvector_*` being normalized to `lbVector_*`.
naming_conventions: Generic function placeholders `func_8000....` can be upgraded to module-prefixed placeholders such as `lb_8000....` when the owning module is identified.
Generic label placeholders `lbl_8000....` can likewise be upgraded to module-prefixed `lb_8000....` names.
Time-related library symbols in the shown address range used the prefix `lbTime_`, e.g. `func_8000AEC8` to `lbTime_8000AEC8`.
Vector utility names use `lbVector_` capitalization rather than `lbvector_`, e.g. `lbvector_Normalize` to `lbVector_Normalize`.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Use linker-map address matching to pair old and new names safely across two map files.
Generate address/from/to tables to review whether symbol substitutions preserve address identity.
Pipe map-derived rename pairs directly into repository-wide replacement when the diff is trusted, or save them to a text file for manual cleanup first.
No direct function matching, assembly scheduling, or codegen tactic is evidenced in the available slice; this PR is primarily rename/tooling infrastructure.

review_feedback.feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews were present in the provided PR slice.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that cite or use `melee-replace-symbols` for repository-wide renames.
Inspect current `tools/replace-symbols` implementation and expected `FIND:REPLACE` parsing behavior.
Inspect current `tools/diff-symbols` implementation for linker-map parsing and `--table` output format.
Look up PR #766 to understand the source rename set imported here.
Search for remaining `lbvector_` symbols that should use `lbVector_` casing.
